victim.value: Dagger dies from heart attack and seizure after diamond exposure allergic reaction
victim.quote: Then her sieger stopped but still have the heart attack...After the CPR Dagger's rib snapped, and now she died.

closed_world.value: Underground location where the four twins are trapped after falling
closed_world.quote: Day 8: out of the ground use-to-be-parents situation on chasing the twins (Angis, Dagger, Flip, and Herb are still underground)

investigator.value: Angis Anginkiss, the diary narrator and twin sister
investigator.quote: Hello, I am Angis Anginkiss. Welcome to Horse valley I will be writing everything that happens in this Diary.

red_herring.value: The twins' alien origin presented as extraordinary when they are revealed to be from planet Occs
red_herring.quote: I was saying you gave me and Ms.A 2 sets of alien twins.

clue_fairness.value: Diamond allergy clue established before underground crisis
clue_fairness.quote: Because she is allergic to diamonds

social_world.value: Earth authority structure with President Marshall coordinating with parents, contrasted with alien King Fosii's military hierarchy
social_world.quote: Men, we must practice, we have to travel for a new planet to roam over

reveal_mechanic.value: Phone conversation reveals twins' true alien nature through overheard parental discussion with president
reveal_mechanic.quote: I was saying you gave me and Ms.A 2 sets of alien twins.

media_and_audience.value: Story framed as diary entries creating intimate first-person documentation of extraordinary events
media_and_audience.quote: Hello, I am Angis Anginkiss. Welcome to Horse valley I will be writing everything that happens in this Diary.

investigator_wound.value: Narrator's loss of twin sister Dagger creates emotional vulnerability driving the quest for resurrection/cloning
investigator_wound.quote: Make a clone or a robot if you want your friends back

_meta.title: ebook wintersk18 the diary the twins on the other vally
